sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31820" key="e)kda/neisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκδᾰ´ν-εισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n31820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lending at interest,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9(1).694</biblScope> </bibl> (Corc.).</sense> </entryFree>
